method: Physical source lines counted from configured source roots. Dependency folders, generated output, runtime artifacts, and local environment files are excluded. Counts include comments; non-blank lines are shown separately in the UI.

systems.summary: The legacy system is a PHP monolith with server-rendered interface screens, separate browser assets/templates, MariaDB DDL scripts, native tests, and local Docker/PowerShell orchestration.

components.label: Interface PHP screens
components.description: Legacy OpenEMR screens under interface/. These files mix page routing, PHP workflow logic, emitted HTML, and embedded browser behavior, so they are counted as the legacy screen surface.

components.label: Browser assets and templates
components.description: Legacy interface HTML, templates, JavaScript, TypeScript, CSS, and Sass. This includes AngularJS-era/browser behavior where it exists in source files.

components.label: Reusable PHP services and libraries
components.description: Legacy PHP classes, library helpers, API routes, and core application entry points outside the interface screen tree.

components.label: MariaDB DDL and upgrade scripts
components.description: Legacy SQL schema and upgrade scripts that define or mutate the MariaDB database shape.

components.label: Native PHPUnit and Jest tests
components.description: OpenEMR-native PHP and JavaScript tests retained with the legacy source tree.

components.label: Local runtime and seed scripts
components.description: Project-owned scripts and Docker Compose files used to run, seed, and test the legacy baseline.

metricRules.label: CREATE TABLE statements
metricRules.detail: Approximate DDL surface found in legacy SQL/PHP schema scripts.

metricRules.label: ALTER TABLE statements
metricRules.detail: Approximate schema migration/mutation surface in legacy SQL/PHP scripts.

metricRules.label: CREATE INDEX statements
metricRules.detail: Approximate explicit index DDL in legacy schema scripts.

metricRules.label: Views, triggers, procedures, functions
metricRules.detail: Approximate database-programming surface in legacy scripts.

systems.summary: The Workbench is a React operator UI plus a local Express orchestration API, configuration contracts, and the shared parity/evidence harness it surfaces.

components.label: React/TypeScript operator UI
components.description: Workbench source for the dashboard, architecture, progress, timeline, test-run, and seed-data screens.

components.label: Express orchestration API
components.description: Local-only API that reads project state, runs allowlisted commands, and serves Workbench metadata.

components.label: Workbench config contracts
components.description: Managed application, architecture inventory, source inventory, and functionality progress contracts.

components.label: Gold seed contract scripts
components.description: Project-owned scripts and manifests that generate the shared synthetic dataset contract.

components.label: Parity and comparison harness
components.description: Shared Playwright parity suites, workflow adapters, database probes, and comparison utilities surfaced by the Workbench.

components.label: Local Workbench runtime scripts
components.description: Scripts and package configuration used to run, build, and operate the Workbench.

systems.summary: The modernized target is a React/TypeScript SPA, ASP.NET Core API, PostgreSQL seed/schema generator, parity evidence, and Docker/PowerShell runtime scripts.

components.label: React/TypeScript frontend
components.description: Modernized OpenEMR SPA screens and styling.

components.label: ASP.NET Core backend
components.description: Modernized workflow APIs, repositories, DTOs, and API project configuration.

components.label: PostgreSQL schema and seed scripts
components.description: Scripts that generate and load the PostgreSQL schema and shared gold dataset mapping.

components.label: Modernized runtime scripts
components.description: Docker Compose, smoke-test, seed, and local runtime scripts for the modernized target.

metricRules.label: CREATE TABLE statements
metricRules.detail: PostgreSQL table definitions emitted by the modernized seed/schema generator.

metricRules.label: CREATE INDEX statements
metricRules.detail: PostgreSQL index definitions emitted by the modernized seed/schema generator.

metricRules.label: Views, triggers, procedures, functions
metricRules.detail: Database-programming objects in the modernized schema scripts.
